title: MMi Daily Iron Ore Index Report December 05 2022
section_path: MMi Daily Iron Ore Index Report December 05 2022
section_path_text: MMi Daily Iron Ore Index Report December 05 2022
summary:
Main
in Chinese iron ore and steelmaking prices 05/12/2022
DCE iron ore futures rose by 2.45% today, the main contract closed 795.5. The traders' willingness to ship is more .The steel mills are active to purchase.The overall trading sentiment of the market is better. PBF at Shandong port dealt 788-793 yuan/mt,increase 13-28 yuan/mt; PBF at Tangshan port dealt 808 yuan/mt, ,increase 23 yuan/mt.
